title: Restore Home.tsx and About.tsx to Version 12 state

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx to its exact Version 12 state using the user-provided Version 12 source code, undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. Leave all other files untouched.

quotes: I want to restore only this home about file from version 12
I'll restore only Home.tsx and About.tsx to their Version 12 state, leaving all other files completely untouched.

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx matches the Version 12 source code provided by the user
No other files are modified as part of this change
The Home page renders correctly using the Version 12 implementation

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/pages/About.tsx to its exact Version 12 state using the user-provided Version 12 source code, undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. Leave all other files untouched.

quotes: I want to restore only this home about file from version 12
I'll restore only Home.tsx and About.tsx to their Version 12 state, leaving all other files completely untouched.

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/pages/About.tsx matches the Version 12 source code provided by the user
No other files are modified as part of this change
The About page renders correctly using the Version 12 implementation

constraints: Only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified — all other files must remain untouched
Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Reverting any other frontend pages, components, hooks, styles, or configuration files
Restoring any admin pages or shared components
